title: Ramapuram Sree Rama Temple
tagline: Ramapuram Sree Rama Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Sree Rama Swami Temple is an ancient Hindu temple located in Ramapuram village in Meenachil tehsil and near Pala in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala.
overview.description: Sree Rama Swami Temple is an ancient Hindu temple located in Ramapuram village in Meenachil tehsil and near Pala in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala. The temple is classified one among the 108 Abhimana kshetrams of Vaishnavate tradition. The temple has Lord Rama as principal deity, facing the east, who is in a four-armed form, Chathurbahu. It is managed by a trust called Ramapuram Devaswom consisting of three Nambudiri families of Amanakara mana, Kunnoor mana and Karanattu mana.

topPlaces.name: Kadanad
topPlaces.description: Kadanad (Malayalam: കടനാട്, romanized: Kaḍanāḍŭ) is a Panchayat and Village in Meenachil Taluk of Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kollappally
topPlaces.description: Kollappally is a developing town in Kottayam district near Pala, Kerala, India. It is located between two major cities of Kerala, Pala and Thodupuzha, on the Main Eastern Highway (state highway-8).

topPlaces.name: Anthinad
topPlaces.description: Anthinad is a small agricultural village in Kottayam district (Meenachil Taluk) situated about 6 kilometres away from Palai. The Main Eastern Highway (Muvattupuzha - Punalur Road) passes through Anthinad and connects it to two of its neighboring towns, Thodupuzha and Pala.

topPlaces.name: Saint Augustine's Forane Church, Ramapuram
topPlaces.description: Saint Augustine's Forane Church is a Syro-Malabar church complex located in Ramapuram of Kottayam district, Kerala, India. It is one of the most prominent churches in the Eparchy of Palai and is a notable shrine housing the tomb of Thevarparampil Kunjachan.

topPlaces.name: Ramapuram, Kottayam
topPlaces.description: Ramapuram is a town in the Kottayam district of the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Ullanadu
topPlaces.description: Ullanadu is a village located in Bharananganam panchayat, Pala, Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala. The village houses around 1000 families.

topPlaces.name: Kudakkachira
topPlaces.description: Kudakkachira is a small village 9 km away from Palai on Pala-uzhavoor road of Ernakulam - Sabarimala state highway in Kottayam district, Kerala, India. It is part of Meenachil Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Pizhaku
topPlaces.description: Pizhaku is a village in Kottayam District in the Indian state of Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ramapuram Sree Rama Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ramapuram Sree Rama Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ramapuram Sree Rama Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (53 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (49 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ramapuram Sree Rama Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ramapuram Sree Rama Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ramapuram Sree Rama Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ramapuram Sree Rama Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ramapuram Sree Rama Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kadanad, Kollappally, Anthinad, Saint Augustine's Forane Church, Ramapuram, Ramapuram, Kottayam.
